description: The page loads the destination selection screen for travel insurance.
frame_description: A blank white page transitions to the 'Where are you travelling' destination selection screen.

description: User clicks into the destination search input field, which triggers the appearance of the popular destinations menu.
frame_description: The cursor clicks the input field and the 'Popular Destinations' header appears below.

description: The 'Popular Destinations' selection menu expands and becomes fully visible with regional categories.
frame_description: The UI updates to show a grid of popular destinations including Pacific, Asia, and Europe.

description: User moves the cursor to hover over the 'All of Europe' destination option.
frame_description: The cursor moves over the 'All of Europe' link, changing to a pointer icon.
